case_title: PATEL, RAYMOND B. vs. JOHNSON, HENRY LEE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, HENRY LEE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 226 6TH STREET, ROOM 20, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT PERFORM 200 HRS OF WORK AT PLTF'S PREMISES IN EXCHANGE FOR RENTS AND DAMAGES DUE THROUGH 10/31/93. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.

#5 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. 10:45 AM C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, ROBERT VALENCIA. DEFT PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, KATHERIN DOI (WILL FILE SUBSTITUTION OF ATTY). A STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFT WILL MOVE NO LATER THAN NOV 1, 1993 AND IS ALLOWED TO MOVE TO HARTLAND HOTEL (ALSO OWNED BY PLTF) TO A ROOM WITH A PRIVATE BATH AT $450.00 PER MONTH. DEFT AGREED TO PAY $225.00 ON NOV 1, 1993 AND $225.00 ON 11/15/93. IN LIEU OF BACKRENT AND DAMAGES, DEFT WILL PERFORM 200 HRS OF WORK ON HARTLAND HOTEL AND OTHER HOTELS OWNED BY PLTF. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTY FEES. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE STIP FOR ENTRY OFJUDGMENT.
